description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a low roofline and smooth, flowing contours. The front end is characterized by a wide grille and integrated headlights, giving it a modern and assertive appearance. The side profile reveals two full-sized doors, flush door handles, and large alloy wheels, emphasizing its sporty nature. The rear showcases a continuous taillight strip and a subtle integrated spoiler, enhancing its dynamic stance. The windows are tinted and the roofline gently slopes towards the rear, typical of a fastback coupe. The exterior is finished in a dark, glossy color, with metallic accents on the wheels and trim.
description: A sleek, dark-colored coupe car with a fastback roofline, wide grille, and continuous rear taillight strip. It features two doors, large alloy wheels, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, integrated headlights, and smooth hood.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two-door configuration, sloping roofline, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous taillight strip, subtle spoiler, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the two-door layout and window configuration.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
